data.title: Tesla Offers Deep Discounts Of Up To $7950 On The Model Y As The EV Giant Gears Up To Deliver The Refreshed Version
data.description: Tesla is offering discounts of up to $7950 on the older version of its Model Y SUV, before it starts delivering the refreshed version.

data.title: Tesla Owners Stay True To Their Cars, While GM Retains The Most Loyal Customers
data.description: General Motors consumers are most loyal to the manufacturer while Tesla vehicle owners are most loyal to the vehicle make.

data.title: After FSD Rollout In China, Musk Says Rollout In Europe Delayed Owing To Lack Of Approvals
data.description: Elon Musk said on Friday that it is still awaiting regulatory clearance to roll out its FSD driver assistance technology in Europe.

data.title: Crypto's Trump-Era Honeymoon Fades As Regulatory Reality Sets In
data.description: Experts say Trump's pro-crypto promises have yet to materialize, but SEC's approach signal progress. Global competition and challenges remain.

data.title: Trump's $5 Trillion To $11 Trillion Tax Plan: A Boost For Growth Or A Path To Unprecedented Debt?
